Problem Statement: In the following exercises, determine if the following points are solutions to the given system of equations.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 6 y = 0 \\ 3 x - 4 y = 5\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓐ $$( 3 , 1 )$$ ⓑ $$( -3 , 4 )$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, determine if the following points are solutions to the given system of equations.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}- 3 x + y = 8 \\ - x + 2 y = -9\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓐ $$( -5 , -7 )$$ ⓑ $$( -5 , 7 )$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, determine if the following points are solutions to the given system of equations.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + y = 2 \\ y = \frac{3}{4} x\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓐ $$( \frac{8}{7} , \frac{6}{7} )$$ ⓑ $$( 1 , \frac{3}{4} )$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, determine if the following points are solutions to the given system of equations.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + 3 y = 6 \\ y = \frac{2}{3} x + 2\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓐ $$( -6 , 2 )$$ ⓑ $$( -3 , 4 )$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, decide whether it would be more convenient to solve the system of equations by substitution or elimination.
Question: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}14 x - 15 y = -30 \\ 7 x + 2 y = 10\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x = 9 y - 11 \\ 2 x - 7 y = -27\end{matrix}\right .$$
In a system of linear equations, the two equations have the same intercepts. Describe the possible solutions to the system.
Solve the system of equations by substitution and explain all your steps in words: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x + y = 12 \\ x = y - 8\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations by elimination and explain all your steps in words: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}5 x + 4 y = 10 \\ 2 x = 3 y + 27\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + y = 10 \\ x - y = 6\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓐ by graphing ⓑ by substitution ⓒ Which method do you prefer? Why?
